titleStmt.title: The Secretary General of the League of Nations ( (Avenol) ) to the Secretary of State

div.head:
The Secretary General of the League of Nations ( Avenol ) to the Secretary of State
Transmitted to the Department by the Minister in Switzerland in his despatch No. 606, L. N. 309, October 19, 1938; received November 3.
div.p: The Council, by a decision taken on the same day, September 30th, instructed me to transmit the said resolution to your Government.

I have the honour further to transmit to you, for information, a copy of the reportLeague of Nations document A.76.1938.VII., Geneva, September 29, 1938, not reprinted. referred to in the first paragraph of the above resolution.
